site.name: Fondazzjoni ta' Klula
site.description: A heritage and cultural foundation celebrating the people, places, and traditions of Gozo.

hero.heading: Gozo. Culture. Alive.
hero.subheading: Celebrating the heritage, culture, and community of Santa Lucija & Gozo.

intro.heading: Who We Are
intro.body: Fondazzjoni ta' Klula is a voluntary organisation dedicated to safeguarding and celebrating the cultural heritage of Santa Lucija, Gozo. We bring the community together through events, arts, oral history, and shared traditions — for residents, visitors, and anyone who loves this village.

highlights.heading: Heritage
highlights.body: Documenting and preserving the stories, traditions, and places that make Santa Lucija unique.

highlights.heading: Culture
highlights.body: From literary evenings to public event, we bring cultural experiences into the heart of the village, with an outlook to Gozo at large.

highlights.heading: Community
highlights.body: Rooted in Santa Lucija, welcoming to all. Our events are designed for everyone — locals and visitors alike.

cta_banner.heading: Be Part of the Story
cta_banner.body: Join us as a member, volunteer, or supporter. Santa Lucija's heritage belongs to all of us.

hero.heading: About Us
hero.subheading: A foundation built on love for Santa Lucija.

story.heading: Our Story
story.body:
Fondazzjoni ta' Klula — VO/0420 — was founded by a group of Santa Lucija residents committed to ensuring that the village's rich heritage is not lost to time. We take our name from Klula, the affectionate local name for Santa Lucija itself.

We are a registered voluntary organisation operating under the Commissioner for Voluntary Organisations, with activities spanning cultural events, heritage documentation, arts programming, and community engagement.

objectives.heading: What We Stand For
items: Safeguarding the tangible and intangible cultural heritage of Santa Lucija
Promoting the village's history, traditions, and natural environment
Supporting arts and cultural activities that engage the local community
Building a welcoming space for residents, visitors, and the wider public
Fostering partnerships with local, national, and international organisations

about.registration_note: Fondazzjoni ta' Klula is registered with the Commissioner for Voluntary Organisations: VO/0420.

hero.heading: What We Do
hero.subheading: Heritage, culture, and community — all year round.

what_we_do.intro: Our programme combines long-standing village traditions with new cultural initiatives. Whether you're a Santa Lucija resident or a visitor to Gozo, there's something here for you.

activities.title: Wine Festival
activities.description: An annual celebration of Gozitan wine and local produce, held in the village and open to all.

activities.title: Ġimgħa Stejjer - Literary Evenings
activities.description: Quarterly literary evenings held in partnership with Inizjamed, bringing poetry, prose, and conversation to Santa Lucija.

activities.title: Heritage & Nature Walks
activities.description: Guided walks through Santa Lucija's countryside and built heritage, led by local guides who know every path and story.

activities.title: Luminary Evening
activities.period: Around 13 December — Feast of St Lucy
activities.description: A candlelit evening celebrating the feast of Santa Lucija, our patron saint, with the children's candle tradition at its heart.

events.intro: All our events are open to everyone — residents, visitors, and friends of the village. Check back regularly for updates.

items.title: Wine Festival 2026
items.description: Join us for our annual Wine Festival celebrating Gozitan wine and local produce. Free entry.

items.title: Literary Evening with Inizjamed
items.description: Our quarterly literary evening in partnership with Inizjamed. Poetry, prose, and good conversation.

gallery.intro: A growing collection of images from our events and activities.

hero.heading: Get in Touch
hero.subheading: We'd love to hear from you.

contact.intro: Whether you'd like to get involved, attend an event, support our work, or simply find out more — drop us a message.

form.success_message: Thank you — we'll be in touch soon.
